heading: Reallocation of D block to public safety
label: 1411 Reallocation of D block to public safety

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Commission shall reallocate the 700 MHz D block spectrum for use by public safety entities in accordance with the provisions of this chapter.
